summary.key_theme: 受惠於 AI 需求強勁與記憶體市場復甦，華爾街分析師普遍看好 Micron 的長期成長潛力並大幅上調目標價。

bullish.title: DA Davidson initiates Micron at Buy, sets $1,000 Street-high target
bullish.reason: DA Davidson 給予買入評級並設定 1,000 美元的華爾街最高目標價，顯示對其記憶體需求前景的極度樂觀。

bullish.title: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Micron Technology, Raises Price Target to $660
bullish.reason: TD Cowen 分析師 Krish Sankar 維持買入評級並將目標價調升至 660 美元，強調記憶體產業的持久性。

bullish.title: Why Micron Stock Is Surging Wednesday? — Micron Technology Inc (NASDAQ: MU) stock surges following Seagate's Q3 earnings beat.
bullish.reason: Seagate 的財報優於預期帶動了整個記憶體與儲存產業的樂觀情緒，進而推升 Micron 股價。

bullish.title: There Is Optimism Around Micron Technology’s HBM Business, Here Is What You Should Know?
bullish.reason: Micron 的 HBM 業務成長潛力巨大，預估五年 EPS 年複合成長率達 130 %，是 AI 基礎設施的核心受益者。

bullish.title: Capitalizing on the AI Buildout: High-Conviction Stock Picks
bullish.reason: 將 Micron 與 NVDA、AVGO 並列為 AI 建設浪潮中的高信念股票，強化了市場對其 AI 題材的認同。

bearish.title: What Is Going On With Micron Stock On Tuesday
bearish.reason: 市場傳出 OpenAI 營收未達標，引發投資人對 AI 支出放緩的擔憂，導致 Micron 股價單日下跌 4 %。

neutral.title: Micron Announces Participation in Investor Event
neutral.reason: 公司宣布參加投資人活動，屬於常規營運公告，對股價無直接影響。

neutral.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Micron Technology (MU) After Its Rapid Share Price Surge
neutral.reason: 針對股價大漲後的估值討論，提醒投資人需審慎評估，屬於中性觀點的市場分析。

neutral.title: Competitor Analysis: Evaluating Micron Technology And Competitors In Semiconductors & Semiconductor Equipment Industry
neutral.reason: 對半導體產業的競爭格局進行評估，提供產業背景資訊，未對 Micron 股價產生直接驅動。
